prompt: Summarize the attached article in exactly 3 bullet points.
scope_boundary: Exactly 3 bullets; no opinions, recommendations, or extra sections.

prompt: Find the year the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' was published and return the year with a source.
scope_boundary: Year and one source only; no summary of the paper.

prompt: Compare PostgreSQL and MongoDB on exactly three criteria: schema flexibility, transaction support, and horizontal scaling.
scope_boundary: The three named criteria only; no overall recommendation.

prompt: List five peer-reviewed papers on reinforcement learning from human feedback, with full citations.
scope_boundary: Citation list only; no summaries or commentary.

prompt: Read the provided paper and summarize only its methodology section.
scope_boundary: Methodology only; ignore results, discussion, and conclusions.

prompt: Fact-check this claim: 'The Great Wall of China is visible from the Moon with the naked eye.' Give a verdict and one source.
scope_boundary: Verdict plus one source; no essay on space photography.

prompt: Find the current population estimate of Istanbul and cite the source.
scope_boundary: One number and one source; no history or demographic analysis.

prompt: Extract every statistic mentioned in the provided press release.
scope_boundary: Statistics only; do not verify or contextualize them.

prompt: Summarize the key differences between HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 in one paragraph.
scope_boundary: One paragraph; no migration advice or benchmarks.

prompt: Find the original release date of Python 3.0 and return it with a source.
scope_boundary: Date and source only; no version history.

prompt: Read the two provided abstracts and state which one reports a larger sample size.
scope_boundary: Sample size comparison only; do not evaluate study quality.

prompt: Quote the definition of 'overfitting' from two different textbooks, with citations.
scope_boundary: Two quoted definitions with citations; no synthesis or own definition.

prompt: Summarize the provided meeting transcript into five action items.
scope_boundary: Five action items only; no commentary on the meeting itself.

prompt: Find which country hosted the 2014 FIFA World Cup; return the country and a source.
scope_boundary: Country and source only; no tournament results.

prompt: From the provided literature review, list all datasets mentioned.
scope_boundary: Dataset names only; no descriptions or download links.

prompt: Write a 100-word neutral summary of the provided product announcement.
scope_boundary: About 100 words, neutral tone; no marketing language or critique.

prompt: Identify the three most-cited papers on graph neural networks and give their citation counts with sources.
scope_boundary: Three papers with counts and sources; no content summaries.

prompt: Read the provided RFC excerpt and explain in two sentences what problem it addresses.
scope_boundary: Two sentences; no implementation details.

prompt: Compare the battery capacities in the two provided phone spec sheets; return both numbers.
scope_boundary: The two battery numbers only; no buying recommendation.

prompt: Find the boiling point of ethanol at standard pressure, with a source.
scope_boundary: One value and one source; no chemistry lecture.

prompt: Summarize the provided 10-page report into an executive summary of at most 150 words.
scope_boundary: Max 150 words; no new recommendations beyond the report.

prompt: From the provided bibliography, return only the entries published after 2020.
scope_boundary: Filter by year only; do not reformat or annotate entries.

prompt: Verify whether the quote attributed to Einstein in the provided text is authentic; give a verdict and a source.
scope_boundary: Verdict and source only; no biography of Einstein.

prompt: List the official system requirements for Docker Desktop on Windows, citing the documentation.
scope_boundary: Windows requirements only; no installation guide.

prompt: Extract the main hypothesis from the provided study abstract.
scope_boundary: The hypothesis only; do not assess whether it was confirmed.

prompt: Find the GDP of Japan for the most recent reported year, and cite the source.
scope_boundary: One figure with year and source; no economic analysis.

prompt: Read the provided changelog and summarize what changed in version 2.0 only.
scope_boundary: Version 2.0 only; ignore all other versions.

prompt: Compare the two provided job descriptions and list the skills required by both.
scope_boundary: The intersection of skills only; no career advice.

prompt: Find when the first email was sent and by whom; return the answer with a source.
scope_boundary: Date, person, and source; no history of the internet.

prompt: List the pros and cons of remote work mentioned in the provided survey report.
scope_boundary: Only points mentioned in the report; do not add your own.

prompt: Extract all author names and affiliations from the provided paper header.
scope_boundary: Names and affiliations only; no contact info or bios.

prompt: Find the maximum depth of the Mariana Trench, with a source.
scope_boundary: One depth value and source; no oceanography overview.

prompt: From the provided news article, list the names of every organization mentioned.
scope_boundary: Organization names only; no people or places.

prompt: Check whether the package 'left-pad' still exists on npm and report its latest version, with a source.
scope_boundary: Existence and version only; no retelling of the 2016 incident.

prompt: Summarize the provided court ruling excerpt in plain language, in one paragraph.
scope_boundary: One plain-language paragraph; no legal opinion.

prompt: Find the publication venue of the paper 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding'.
scope_boundary: Venue name and year only; no summary of BERT.

prompt: Read the two provided migration guides and list the steps that appear in both.
scope_boundary: Common steps only; do not write a merged guide.

prompt: Find the average annual rainfall of London and cite a source.
scope_boundary: One value and source; no climate change discussion.

prompt: Extract the points from the limitations section of the provided paper as a bullet list.
scope_boundary: Limitations section only; do not propose solutions.

prompt: Identify the founding year of the United Nations; return the year with a source.
scope_boundary: Year and source only; no institutional history.

prompt: Summarize what the provided API documentation says about rate limits.
scope_boundary: Rate limits only; ignore authentication and endpoints.

prompt: Compare the MIT and GPLv3 licenses on exactly two points: redistribution and derivative works.
scope_boundary: The two named points only; no license recommendation.

prompt: From the provided interview transcript, extract every question the interviewer asked.
scope_boundary: Questions only; do not include or summarize the answers.

prompt: Find the speed of light in vacuum in meters per second, with an authoritative source.
scope_boundary: One value and source; no physics explanation.

prompt: Read the provided abstract and classify the study as qualitative or quantitative, with a one-sentence justification.
scope_boundary: Classification plus one sentence; no full review.

prompt: List the ingredients mentioned in the provided recipe text.
scope_boundary: Ingredients only; no instructions, substitutions, or nutrition facts.

prompt: Find the number of confirmed moons of Jupiter according to the latest count, and cite the source.
scope_boundary: Count and source only; no astronomy overview.

prompt: Summarize the data retention section of the provided privacy policy in two sentences.
scope_boundary: Data retention only; ignore other policy sections.

prompt: From the three provided abstracts, identify which study used the largest dataset and return its citation.
scope_boundary: One citation only; no quality assessment of the studies.

prompt: Find the winners of the 2018 Turing Award and return the names with a source.
scope_boundary: Names and source only; no biography or work summary.
